headline: Tubi Sets Precedent as ChatGPT's First Native Streaming App Partner
summary: Fox's Tubi has launched the first native streaming app inside ChatGPT, letting users discover and watch content without leaving the AI interface. This marks a shift in how AI platforms are evolving from answer engines into full-stack application ecosystems. For platform players, the race to become the default AI app layer is accelerating—distribution is moving to where attention already lives.
oci_implication: As AI platforms like ChatGPT become distribution channels in their own right, cloud providers enabling these integrations—storage, inference, low-latency delivery—stand to capture new workload demand. OCI should assess whether its media and entertainment customers are positioning for similar ChatGPT app partnerships, and whether OCI's AI infrastructure story can be part of that pitch.
